---
title: "test_audit_dialogue_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_audit_dialogue_empire.py"
loc: 32
complexity: 3
logic_score: 5.20
style_score: 3.63
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.36
---

## Intent
The `test_audit_dialogue_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestAuditDialogueEmpire, test_audit_flow, test_audit_deviance. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestAuditDialogueEmpire, test_audit_flow, test_audit_deviance. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 14 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.tools.debug](file://src.tools.debug)

### Exports
- `TestAuditDialogueEmpire`
- `test_audit_flow`
- `test_audit_deviance`
